IDEA · 01
Glossa AI
Forming
Auditing AI systems for cultural and linguistic blind spots in bilingual English/Spanish contexts. For FinTech and consumer platforms serving the US Hispanic market.
Linguistic AI
IDEA · 02
Pop-up Lab
Forming
A physical space where the Latinx community learns user research — and where companies run real tests with real users. Part learning lab, part research facility.
Community Research

EXPERIMENT · 01
Nico in SF
Live
Documenting innovation inside the Latinx community of San Francisco — as a field researcher, not an influencer. The city's most digital neighborhoods, walked on foot.
Field Documentation

EXPERIMENT · 02
Hola LATAM
Building
Market entry research for startups going into Latin America. Ground truth where Big Data and AI hallucinate. Built on Chakakuna's 10 years of methodology.
Market Research
Businesses 2 active
BUSINESS · 01
Chakakuna
Active
The mothership. A decade of field research methodology decoding human behavior in Latin American markets. Every other experiment runs on Chakakuna's DNA.

BUSINESS · 02
Sinappsis
Validating
Diaspora mentorship network connecting Latin American students with professionals who've already navigated the systems they're trying to enter. Epistemic access, not just advice.
